name: case-eligibility-er
title: Case Utilisation of Eligibility Data — ER Proposal
subtitle: newUM V1 · Sprint 26.04.14 · #187416 (Carlos) · Miro ER Update Draft

nodes.name: Member Search
nodes.subtitle: Health Plan + DOB + Member ID or Name

nodes.name: Coverage Date Check
nodes.subtitle: effective_date ≤ tx_start ≤ expiration_date

frame.label: 6 Sequential Rules — Any FAIL → Out of Scope

nodes.name: Rule 1 — LOB Validation
nodes.subtitle: lob | delegation_status — active + delegated to OH

nodes.name: Rule 2 — Product Validation
nodes.subtitle: product_line | product_offering — delegated under LOB

nodes.name: Rule 3 — State Restriction
nodes.subtitle: state_of_plan_issue — payer's allowed set

nodes.name: Rule 4 — Carve-Out Check
nodes.subtitle: carrier_id | account_id | group_id — also feeds Provider

nodes.name: Rule 5 — ASO Delegation
nodes.subtitle: aso_indicator — excluded → OOS

nodes.name: Rule 6 — Benefit Delegation
nodes.subtitle: member_benefit | rx_carveout | oon_benefit — OON → Provider

nodes.name: NPI Lookup
nodes.subtitle: Practitioner (T1) or Organization (T2)

nodes.name: Network / OON Check
nodes.subtitle: Reads oon_benefit from Elig Rule 6 · OON determination = R2

nodes.name: Product Code Check
nodes.subtitle: carrier_id + account_id from Elig Rule 4

nodes.name: Site of Care (SoC)
nodes.subtitle: ELIG: benefits → SoC | PROV: facility T2 NPI

nodes.name: Facility Type (T2)
nodes.subtitle: HOPD vs standalone — affects reimbursement. CMS POS logic. V1 concern

nodes.name: Specialty (T1 only)
nodes.subtitle: taxonomy_code from NPPES. V1 = Practitioner (T1). Organization (T2) post-V1

nodes.name: GAP Review
nodes.subtitle: Payer-configured provider gap analysis

frame.label: PostgreSQL OLTP (same DB as Eligibility) — each box = 1 table

nodes.name: Case
nodes.subtitle: FK: EligibilityVersionId (guid) → Eligibility | Main UM case record

nodes.name: CaseDrugElements (×3 tables)
nodes.subtitle: Medical + Pharmacy + Radiation | Each FK: EligVersionId → Eligibility

nodes.name: KeyFieldType
nodes.subtitle: Snapshot cols: MemberId, DOB, SSN, LOB, CovStart/End, IsEHBPlan — frozen at intake

nodes.name: PotentialEligibility
nodes.subtitle: FK: EligVersionId + CaseId | Dual eligible = 2 rows | DSNP open #183771

nodes.name: CaseOfficeContact
nodes.subtitle: FK: CaseId | Cols: ProviderRole (Ord/Serv), Name, Phone, Fax, Email

nodes.name: CasePOSCode
nodes.subtitle: FK: CaseId | Cols: POSCode VARCHAR(2), POSDescription

nodes.name: PDL Drug Rules
nodes.subtitle: LOB + effective date → Benefit Type + PA status

nodes.name: NP Drug Rules
nodes.subtitle: LOB + Product Line + Billing Method + Dx Group

nodes.name: Letter V2 / Fax Service
nodes.subtitle: Reads Elig: FirstName, LastName, DOB, SSN, CoverageEffective/End + Office Contact fax

nodes.name: Case Routing & Queues
nodes.subtitle: LOB + pathway type + complexity → queue assignment

nodes.name: TAT Configuration
nodes.subtitle: LOB + delegation_level → Chronos timer config

nodes.name: Mid-Case Re-evaluation
nodes.subtitle: New eligibility arrives → trigger rule reload? Mechanism TBD. Open design question
